description: Chrome cache parser (best-effort) walks Cache directory, extracts URLs from SimpleCache EOF records
steps: Walk immediate files in cache_dir (not subdirectories)
For each file: read all bytes, if < 24 bytes skip
Read last 24 bytes as EOF record. Bytes 8-12 (offset 8 from end-24) = key_size as u32 LE
If key_size == 0 or key_size > 8192 skip (sanity check)
Read bytes at position [file_len - 24 - key_size .. file_len - 24] as UTF-8 string
If valid UTF-8 and contains 'http', emit event with that as URL
Timestamp: 0 (cache entries have no reliable timestamp in this approach)
Test factory: create TempDir, write hand-crafted binary files with known URL embedded before 24-byte EOF record
Test: parse_empty_cache_dir_returns_empty — no files yields empty vec
Test: parse_cache_extracts_url_from_entry — crafted file yields event with correct url attr
